leadText: The Black Mane Hair (Japanese: くろいたてがみ Black Mane) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Black Mane Hair is used along with a Radiant Petal to create the Reins of Unity .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests' beloved steed, Spectrier. The hair is very smooth to the touch.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Black Mane Hair is used along with a Radiant Petal to create the Reins of Unity . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Mane hair that belonged to the King of Bountiful Harvests' beloved steed, Spectrier. The hair is very smooth to the touch. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh CT Freezington (obtained upon defeating Spectrier if the player chose to plant the Carrot Seeds in the Old Cemetery )
